global.title: This Tesla owner won $10k in court for Tesla’s FSD lies (Updated)

global.title: Blink and Kempower expand US East Coast EV fast charging
global.summary: Kempower and Blink Charging are expanding their EV fast-charging partnership across the US East Coast, with 14 new charging sites planned through 2026. more…

global.title: The 2027 Chevy Equinox and Blazer EVs fix one big complaint drivers had
global.summary: The 2027 Chevy Equinox EV and Blazer EV are almost here, bringing a few updates that fix some of the biggest complaints with the current models. more…

global.title: Republicans devise another way to make electricity more expensive with new fees
global.summary: As everything gets less affordable, republicans are proposing big new inspection fees for cheap energy projects, trying to protect their fossil fuel masters from the rise of better options. more…

global.title: BYD’s new electric SUV secures over 30,000 orders in its first week
global.summary: The Yuan Plus, sold overseas as the Atto 3, is among BYD’s best-selling vehicles. After launching the third-generation model with a longer driving range and Flash Charging, BYD said the new EV received over 30,000 orders in one week. more…

global.title: Toyota is scrapping plans to launch one of its most important EVs
global.summary: The low-slung Lexus LF-ZC electric sedan is dead. Toyota is scrapping plans to launch the next-gen luxury EV, which was expected to enter production later this year with advanced new batteries and a dedicated platform. more…
